description: The three inventory::submit! blocks correctly gate on mode: BackendRegistration and WritableBackendRegistration reject non-NV URIs via !b.is_nv(), and SigningBackendRegistration rejects non-Sign URIs via !b.is_sign(). Error messages clearly direct users to the correct factory. The is_nv()/is_sign() predicates are exhaustive (Mode has exactly two variants). No issue.
title: Inventory factories correctly reject wrong-mode URIs
